new_pet_prompt: Start a new game to get a new MojiGotchi.
editor_helptext:
HOW TO USE MOJIGOTCHI LEVEL EDITOR
----------------------------------
The editor allows you to customize your MojiGotchi's world.
Use the arrow keys to move the cursor,
information about the selected cell will show
at the top.
The top-right corner panel shows which layer is active.
Press TAB to switch layers,
press s to turn layer highlighting on/off.
The bottom panel shows available tiles to place.
Use [ and ] to browse more tiles,
and 1-9 to select a tile.
When a tile is selected, you can use the spacebar to place the tile.
Press 0 to enter delete mode when you want to clear tiles.
Press r to draw rectangles, press f to flood fill.
editor_config_introtext:
Here you can configure your MojiGotchi's world.

Current configuration:
modaltext_help:
GOAL:

Keep your virtual pet alive by managing its statistics.
 CONTROLS:
- Up/Down Arrows: Navigate through the menu.
- Enter: Confirm your selection.
- Escape: Close this window.

ACTIONS:
- Feed: Increases fullness and energy. Watch out for overfeeding!
- Play: Increases mood, but costs energy.
- Pet: Increases mood and makes your pet a little tired.
- Wake up: Wakes up your pet if it's sleeping, but this harms its mood.
- Sleep: Your pet falls asleep automatically when it's tired.
